subject: Kid Trunks (Dragon Ball Super) — child anime IP character, energetic attack pose with ki energy
description: A young child with short light-colored hair extends one arm forward in an attack posture. A vivid purple and pink ki energy blast radiates from the outstretched hand, filling the foreground with color. His expression is focused and confident. The character wears a sleeveless top. The background bursts with warm purple-pink energy, consistent with the art direction of the Tiny Rivals series pairing with Son Goten.
foreground: Young child with short light hair, arm outstretched firing a ki blast in purple-pink energy
background: Warm purple-pink energy burst with radial light scatter
